title: PacBio Q1 2026 Earnings: Revenue Flat, 2026 Outlook $165M-$175M
text: PacBio announced Q1 2026 financial results with revenue guidance update for full-year 2026. Q1 2026 revenue was $37.2 million, flat year-over-year, with consumables hitting record $21.8 million. Instrument revenue fell to $9.7 million from $11.0 million year-earlier. PacBio trimmed Q1 2026 loss with adjusted EPS of -$0.12 versus analyst estimates of -$0.14. Full-year 2026 revenue outlook set at $165 million to $175 million, down from previous guidance. The guidance reduction reflected softer Vega demand and a challenging funding environment impacting instrument sales. However, consumables growth remained strong with clinical adoption accelerating. Non-GAAP gross margin expected to improve to 41-44% range in 2026, driven by SPRQ-Nx launch and product mix shift toward higher-margin consumables. Non-GAAP operating expenses projected at $220-225 million.
